Profile

About Me

I'm a passionate frontend engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I specialize in crafting beautiful, accessible, and performant user interfaces that solve real-world problems.

My expertise spans across modern frontend technologies, responsive design, and creating design systems that scale. I'm passionate about clean code, best practices, and mentoring junior developers.

Senior Frontend Engineer

ROVA

Developed and maintained client-facing applications

  • Wrote automated tests ensuring at least 85% coverage
